min_version.description: Oldest marketing version allowed to continue when platform-specific build gates are unset. Raised to 1.0.1 for the profilePhotos-only storage cutover.

min_build_android.description: Oldest Android versionCode allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible Android build is available.

min_build_ios.description: Oldest iOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible iOS build is available.

min_build_web.description: Oldest web build allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible web build is deployed.

min_build_macos.description: Oldest macOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue. Raise only after a compatible macOS build is available.

store_url_android.description: Play Store URL used by the force-update screen once the listing is public.

store_url_ios.description: Legacy Consumer App Store URL retained while role-prefixed parameters are rolled out.

consumer_min_version.description: Oldest Consumer marketing version allowed to continue.

consumer_min_build_android.description: Oldest Consumer Android versionCode allowed to continue.

consumer_min_build_ios.description: Oldest Consumer iOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue.

consumer_min_build_web.description: Oldest Consumer web build allowed to continue.

consumer_min_build_macos.description: Oldest Consumer macOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue.

consumer_store_url_android.description: Consumer Play Store URL used once the listing is public.

consumer_store_url_ios.description: Consumer App Store URL used once the listing is public.

host_min_version.description: Oldest Host marketing version allowed to continue.

host_min_build_android.description: Oldest Host Android versionCode allowed to continue.

host_min_build_ios.description: Oldest Host iOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue.

host_min_build_web.description: Oldest Host web build allowed to continue.

host_min_build_macos.description: Oldest Host macOS CFBundleVersion allowed to continue.

host_store_url_android.description: Host Play Store URL used once the listing is public.

host_store_url_ios.description: Host App Store URL used once the listing is public.

enable_launch_access_gate.description: Enables the in-app launch access application gate. Keep false until routing is explicitly wired to the access flow.
